scripts.dev:cms: concurrently -n api,admin -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:cms && npm run build:site
scripts.build:cms: npm run build --workspace=admin && npm run build --workspace=api
scripts.build:site: node scripts/prebuild.mjs && astro build && node scripts/copy-blog.mjs
scripts.start: npm run build:site && npm run serve
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
scripts.docker:rebuild-site: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml exec web /docker/build-site.sh && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml exec web nginx -s reload
